# Flame Spear Engine
This is a C++ engine for rendering objects

## Downloading the engine
1. Go to the table under this list and install the installer for your OS
2. Open the installer EXE and install the version of FSE you would like
3. Open that version of FSE with the installer and start developing

## Developing on the engine
1. Clone the repo
2. If you dont have gcc / clang / msvc download a version that supports C++23
3. Run the setup_all script in scripts/engine for your engine
4. 
5.
